name: bg-wordle
description: Play BG Wordle with unlimited 5-letter words! Can you guess the hidden word in 6 tries?
author: Deyan 'stambolievv' Stamboliev

scripts.gh-pages:deploy: npm run gh-pages:build && npm run gh-pages:create && npm run gh-pages:publish
scripts.gh-pages:build: set BRANCH=gh-pages&& npm run prod:build && copy dist\index.html dist\404.html
scripts.gh-pages:create: git rev-parse --verify --quiet gh-pages || (git branch gh-pages && git push --set-upstream origin gh-pages)
scripts.gh-pages:publish: gh-pages --dist=dist --message="fix: deploy dist for github pages"
